summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lineup Admin Dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend components working perfectly with real PostgreSQL and MongoDB data integration.
passed_tests: Admin login with valid credentials (admin@lineup-sports.in)
Invalid credentials rejection with error message
Auth protection redirecting to login
Dashboard loads with all components
KPI Cards showing correct data (3 users, 3 sessions, 2 active, 5 venues)
User Growth chart renders with data points
Sessions Over Time chart renders
Sports Distribution pie chart shows Football and Cricket
Session Status chart shows open and completed sessions
Venue Popularity chart shows 5 venues
Recent Sessions table displays session data
Downloads Widget shows current total and allows updates
Downloads update functionality (backend and frontend)
Participants Stats component displays top users and fill rates
Refresh button reloads all data successfully
Logout redirects to login page
All analytics endpoints return 200 status
JWT token authentication working
PostgreSQL database integration working
MongoDB admin auth and downloads storage working
